message:
fix(layout): use min-height instead of fixed height for scroll compatibility

Complete the mobile Safari scroll fix by changing height constraints to
min-height throughout the layout hierarchy.

## app/globals.css
- Change html height: 100% → min-height: 100%; height: auto
- Change body height: 100% → min-height: 100%; height: auto
- Fixed heights on html/body prevent proper scroll measurement on
  mobile browsers that report scroll state differently

## components/client-shell.tsx
- Add min-h-screen to main content wrapper
- Ensures content fills viewport while allowing natural overflow

These changes work together with getScrollMetrics() to ensure scroll
progress tracking works correctly across all browsers and devices.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
